query: 9th World Congress Against Death Penalty Macron attendance July 2026

{"query":"9th World Congress Against Death Penalty Macron attendance July 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1482,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.ecpm.org/en/2026/07/02/in-paris-the-9th-world-congress-against-the-death-penalty-marks-further-progress-towards-abolition/","title":"In Paris, the 9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty marks further progress towards abolition - ECPM","content":"Gathered in Paris for three days, more than 1,300 participants from around 100 countries worldwide reaffirmed that, despite a resurgence in executions in certain states, the global trend remains one of abolition.
Several major policy announcements, including Lebanon’s commitment to abolition and the Morocco’s invitation to host the next World Congress, marked this 9th edition.
Organised by Ensemble contre la peine de mort (ECPM), under the patronage of France – the host country of the Congress – the European Union and Switzerland, the event brought together high-level politicians, judges, lawyers, diplomats, international experts, civil society organisations, academics, artists and eyewitnesses to the death penalty.
On the fringes of the Congress, the President of the French Republic, Emmanuel Macron, came to greet the participants and to reiterate that “The battle for abolition, because it is a battle for human dignity, is eminently contemporary”, thereby reaffirming France’s commitment to universal abolition.
For its part, Morocco has expressed its wish to host the 10th World Congress Against the Death Penalty in three years’ time, demonstrating the growing role played by the African continent in the abolitionist movement.
The 10th World Congress Against the Death Penalty is now scheduled to take place in 2029."},{"url":"https://us.diplomatie.gouv.fr/en/france-will-host-9th-world-congress-against-death-penalty","title":"France will host the 9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty | France in the U.S.","content":"The event takes place in Paris at the Maison de la Radio et de la Musique (30 June and 1 July) and the Hôtel de Lassay (2 July).
In 2025, Amnesty International recorded over 2,700 executions in 17 countries.
Thanks to your collective mobilization, all of you here today, the promise of a world without the death penalty is accessible."},{"url":"https://idpc.net/events/2026/05/9th-world-congress-against-the-death-penalty","title":"9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty - International Drug Policy Consortium (IDPC)","content":"May 13, 2026 — The 9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty will take place in Paris from 30 June to 2 July 2026. The free event will bring together more ...
The free event will bring together more than 1,000 participants from around the world for three days of debates, cultural actions, youth activities, networking opportunities and key advocacy moments.
The Congress aims to gather the global abolitionist movement, encourage concrete commitments towards ending capital punishment, strengthen cooperation between political leaders and civil society, and raise awareness of the realities of the death penalty."},{"url":"https://onu.delegfrance.org/french-diplomacy-working-to-further-abolition-of-the-death-penalty","title":"French diplomacy working to further abolition of the death penalty - France ONU","content":"Oct 10, 2025 — A major event in 2026 France will host the 9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty from 30 June to 2 July 2026 in Paris.
On 10 October 2025, on the 23rd World Day Against the Death Penalty, France reiterates its opposition to the death penalty, in all places and under all circumstances.
France calls on all States to sign and ratify the Second Optional Protocol to the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights, which aims to abolish it.
This is the third time that this World Congress has been held in France, 25 years after the first one in Strasbourg."},{"url":"https://www.ecpm.org/en/9wc/","title":"9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty - ECPM","content":"more than a thousand participants ・ will take place from 30 June to 2 July 2026 ・ then at the Hôtel de Lassay. 5 June to 15 July 2026.

tavily.raw: {"query":"9th World Congress Against Death Penalty Macron attendance July 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://idpc.net/events/2026/05/9th-world-congress-against-the-death-penalty","title":"9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty - International Drug Policy Consortium (IDPC)","content":"# 9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty. Together against the Death Penalty (Ensemble contre la peine de mort – ECPM). The 9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty will take place in Paris from 30 June to 2 July 2026. The free event will bring together more than 1,000 participants from around the world for three days of debates, cultural actions, youth activities, networking opportunities and key advocacy moments. The Congress aims to gather the global abolitionist movement, encourage concrete commitments towards ending capital punishment, strengthen cooperation between political leaders and civil society, and raise awareness of the realities of the death penalty. It will also focus on combating discrimination, preventing the resurgence of capital punishment and protecting fundamental rights. Key themes include the role of the judiciary, the situation in East Asia, youth leadership in the movement, protection of abolitionists, and the continued use of the death penalty in the context of drug control.","score":0.84215075,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.lemonde.fr/en/politics/article/2026/07/01/macron-positions-himself-as-custodian-of-abolition-of-capital-punishment_6755036_5.html","title":"Macron positions himself as custodian of abolition of capital punishment","content":"On Tuesday, June 30, he attended the 9th World Congress Against the Death Penalty, held in Paris, to warn against calls to restore capital","score":0.81665546,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/FranceInMalta/posts/-9th-world-congress-against-the-death-penalty-30-june-2-july-2026-in-parisorgani/1481292074037018","title":"🌍 9TH WORLD CONGRESS AGAINST... - Ambassade de France à Malte","content":"## Ambassade de France à Malte's Post. ### **Ambassade de France à Malte**. 🌍 9TH WORLD CONGRESS AGAINST THE DEATH PENALTY, 30 JUNE – 2 JULY 2026 IN PARIS.
